landChangeMethodology.subtitle: How Lankawa turns land-cover research into a district morning check вҖ” without hosting satellite mosaics.
landChangeMethodology.whatBody: Each district has a greenery index and a built-up index on a 0вҖ“100 scale for 2018 and 2024. Deltas are point changes over that window. Numbers are sized for civic pulse use (compare with AQI or flood status), not cadastral mapping.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogTitle: What Team Watchdog does вҖ” and what we do instead
landChangeMethodology.watchdogBody: Team WatchdogвҖҷs satellite2024 project publishes annual Sentinel-2 mosaics and land-cover grids for journalism and research. That work is excellent prior art under MIT licence. LankawaвҖҷs job is different: a daily, trilingual product with freshness provenance.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint1: We do not host multiвҖ‘GB mosaics or Drive folders inside the app.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint2: We ship small district JSON, an API, CSV export, and district-page cards.
landChangeMethodology.watchdogPoint3: We credit Watchdog as research inspiration; our indices are LankawaвҖҷs civic aggregation until a yearвҖ‘2 ETL writes observations from LULC grids.
landChangeMethodology.honestyBody: This series is curated / seed until Lankawa runs its own yearly land-cover ETL. It is not Survey Department land use, not zoning, and not a live sensor feed. Treat it like other Lankawa seed pulses: useful context with clear provenance.
landChangeMethodology.apiBody: Machine-readable access uses the same shape as other Lankawa civic endpoints.
